name: Jack Sewing Machine Co., Ltd.
summary: Jack Sewing Machine Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures sewing equipment in China and internationally. The company provides spreading, automatic cutting, lockstitch, overlock, interlock, special, and automatic pocket welting machines, as well as motors. Its products are used in various industries, such as apparel, footwear, luggage, furniture, leather, automotive, aerospace, etc. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Taizhou, China.
